name: browser-control
description: Browser automation setup and routing support for Chrome and Microsoft Edge stable, beta, dev, and canary channels.

interface.shortDescription: Control Chrome and Edge channels with Codex
interface.longDescription: Browser Control adds setup, detection, native-host manifest management, launch support, and runtime routing guidance for Chrome and Microsoft Edge stable, beta, dev, and canary channels. Process-based runtime identity is tab-free by default. Connected-backend observation is available on Unix-like platforms; Windows reports native-host and profile setup status but cannot currently prove a live Browser Use connection through Unix socket inspection.
defaultPrompt: use Chrome Dev for this browser task
use Edge Dev for this browser task
